---
title: "Research"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: " "
---

My research focuses on empirical insurance economics, with emphasis on financial accounting, taxation, regulation, and enterprise risk management. For a full record, see my [CV](cv.qmd).

## Publications

::: {.pub-entry}
**Healthy Competition? Health Insurer Mergers Pre- and Post-ACA**<br>
With Joshua D. Frederick and Charles C. Yang.<br>
Forthcoming, *North American Actuarial Journal*.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2026.2664596)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Actuarial Implications of Changes in Financial Reporting on Insurer Investments and Earnings Management**<br>
With Dan Yang and James M. Carson.<br>
Forthcoming, *North American Actuarial Journal*.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5268327)] [[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2026.2639547)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Risk Management and Corporate Lifecycles: Evidence from Reinsurance Purchases**<br>
With Cassandra R. Cole.<br>
*Journal of Corporate Finance*, 2026, 98: 102961.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4608575)] [[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0929119926000192)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Accounting Standards and Gains Trading**<br>
With Kyeonghee Kim and Marc A. Ragin.<br>
*Journal of Insurance Regulation*, 2025, 44(5): 1–43.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3969335)] [[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://content.naic.org/research/jir/accounting-standards-and-gains-trading)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Enterprise Risk Management and Corporate Tax Planning**<br>
With Anne C. Ehinger and Jianren Xu.<br>
*Journal of Risk and Insurance*, 2024, 91(3): 529–566.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3717865)] [[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1111/jori.12469)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Capital Structure and Financing in the Health Insurance Industry: Evidence from the Affordable Care Act**<br>
With Joshua D. Frederick and J. Bradley Karl.<br>
*Journal of Insurance Issues*, 2024, 47(1): 1–34.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://www.jstor.org/stable/48770672)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Are Internal Capital Markets Ex-Post Efficient?**<br>
With James M. Carson, David L. Eckles, and Joshua D. Frederick.<br>
*North American Actuarial Journal*, 2023, 27(4): 630–655.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2022.2126373)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Managed Care or Carefully Managed? Management of Underwriting Profitability by Health Insurers**<br>
With Patricia H. Born and E. Tice Sirmans.<br>
*Geneva Papers on Risk and Insurance—Issues and Practice*, 2023, 48(1): 5–31.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1057/s41288-021-00239-1)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Market Reactions to Enterprise Risk Management Adoption, Incorporation by Ratings Agencies, and ORSA Act Passage**<br>
With Jianren Xu.<br>
*Risk Management and Insurance Review*, 2021, 24(2): 151–180.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1111/rmir.12170)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Accounting-Based Regulation: Evidence from Health Insurers and the Affordable Care Act**<br>
With David L. Eckles and Andrew Van Buskirk.<br>
*The Accounting Review*, 2021, 96(2): 231–259.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3282300)] [[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.2308/tar-2019-0173)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Reducing Medical Malpractice Loss Reserve Volatility Through Tort Reform**<br>
With Patricia H. Born and W. Kip Viscusi.<br>
*North American Actuarial Journal*, 2020, 24(4): 626–646.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2020.1733616)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**It's About Time: An Examination of Loss Reserve Development Time Horizons**<br>
With Michael M. Barth and David L. Eckles.<br>
*North American Actuarial Journal*, 2019, 23(2): 143–168.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2018.1538804)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**CEO Overconfidence and Earnings Management: Evidence from Property-Liability Insurers' Reserve Errors**<br>
With Thomas R. Berry-Stölzle and Jianren Xu.<br>
*North American Actuarial Journal*, 2018, 22(3): 380–404.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1080/10920277.2017.1421977)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Ratings: It's Accrual World**<br>
With James M. Carson and David L. Eckles.<br>
*Journal of Risk and Insurance*, 2018, 85(3): 787–809.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons doi >}} Published](https://doi.org/10.1111/jori.12179)]
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.pub-entry}
**Regulatory Capital and Deferred Tax Assets**<br>
With Anne C. Ehinger and Cathryn M. Meegan.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3461346)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**The Capital Market Consequences Associated with Classifying Unrealized Gains and Losses on Available-For-Sale (AFS) Equity Securities in GAAP Net Income**<br>
With John L. Campbell, James M. Carson, and Dan Yang.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4032821)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Regulatory Capital and Catastrophe Risk**<br>
With Kyeonghee Kim.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4468543)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Asymmetry in Earnings Management Surrounding Targeted Ratings**<br>
With David L. Eckles and Martin Halek.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3846968)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Earnings Management, Executive Compensation, and Ownership Structure**<br>
With David L. Eckles, Martin Halek, and Lawrence S. Powell.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Homeowners Insurance and Housing Prices**<br>
With Kyeonghee Kim and Tingyu Zhou.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4852702)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**The Usefulness of Disaggregated Disclosures for Complex Estimates: Evidence from the Claim Loss Reserve**<br>
With Anne C. Ehinger and Andrea Tillet.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4447626)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Accounting Discretion and Loss Reserve Discounting: Evidence from Canadian Property-Casualty Insurers**<br>
With David L. Eckles and Mary Kelly.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4130633)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**A Text-Based Measure of Corporate Risk Management**<br>
With Steve M. Miller and Po-Lin Wang.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5624330)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Climate Risk and Commercial Property Insurance**<br>
With Stephen L. Buschbom, Chongyu Wang, and Tingyu Zhou.<br>
[[{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5841862)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Enterprise Risk Management and Financial Misconduct**<br>
With Chan Li, Lili Sun, and Jianren Xu.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Enterprise Risk Management and Employee Safety**<br>
With Yuchen Qi and Jianren Xu.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Capital Structure, Financial Strength Ratings, and Market Discipline**<br>
With James M. Carson and Dan Yang.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Insurance Solvency Regulation in the Shadows: Evidence and Effects of Informal Regulatory Intervention**<br>
With Michael M. Barth and Robert W. Klein.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Personal Characteristics and Accounting Estimates: Evidence from CEOs, Actuaries, and Reported Loss Reserves**<br>
With Olga Kanj and Mary Kelly.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Errors in Claim-Level Reserving: Evidence from Medical Malpractice Claims**<br>
With Patricia H. Born and Paul C. Schriefer.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Bad Faith Claims Litigation in the Property-Casualty Insurance Industry**<br>
With Patricia H. Born and Dana Telljohann.
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Managerial Style and Accounting Discretion: Evidence from the Property-Casualty Insurance Industry**
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
**Innovation and Cost of Capital: An Examination of the 2010 Affordable Care Act**<br>
With Anne C. Ehinger.
:::
